title: EasyHealth
description: A simple mod that requires Fabric Language Kotlin, which changes hearts and armor to numbers. And it's also VERY lightweight so it's made for not high end systems or people trying to get MAX FPS!
body: EasyHealth is a fabric mod that requires Fabric Language Kotlin. It changes your hearts (health) to numbers, so it is easy to read! The reason this mod was made is for huge health bars so you can read it instead of counting if you're using commands to get super high HP. It also can be used for RPG-style of games because numeric looks better than a 20 hearts. It's also made so then LOW end systems can use it, its like light weight vesion of BetterHP for low end OR people trying to get the MOST FPS. Also it is easier to read then BetterHP. [[Discord Invite!]](https://discord.gg/EBDq7Jzgyz)
